name: Atrium
explanation: A natural, bright digital ambience room reverb. Cascaded input-diffusion allpasses scatter the signal into a dense early-reflection cloud that feeds an 8-line feedback delay network with a lossless Hadamard mix, giving a smooth, colourless, metallic-ring-free tail. A gentle high-frequency air shelf keeps the top open and the room sounds invisible rather than boxy. Controls: Mix, Size, Decay, Diffusion, Air and stereo Width.
